title: Salty Crunchy Energizing Moroccan Snapper Fish Stir-fry
description: A vibrant and energizing Moroccan-inspired dish featuring snapper fish in a salty, crunchy sauce that's both plant-based-friendly and easy to prepare.
instructions: Clean and season the snapper fish fillets with salt. Place them on a baking sheet.
Toast onion, red onion, and green bell pepper slices in a pan over medium heat until softened and slightly browned.
Add garlic, tomato paste, paprika, cumin seed, oregano, turmeric powder, and salt to the pan. Stir well to combine.
Transfer the toasted vegetables and fish to a bowl, pour the spice mixture over them, and toss gently to coat evenly.
Pour coconut oil into an oven-safe skillet or wok and heat on medium-high until shimmering.
Add snapper fish fillets coated with the spice mixture, garlic, green bell pepper, red onion, and tomato paste. Fry for about 4-5 minutes per side or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from heat and serve hot as a snack or appetizer.
